notes: Wave 12 Track A candidate, from country-hub-data.js gap scan.

Owner explicitly confirmed 2026-07-14 (AskUserQuestion) to proceed with Easter-cycle events, framed strictly around legal/civil/historical status, matching the existing live good-friday-germany/ascension-day-germany pattern.

Date rule (easter type, easterOffset 1) and status (uniform holiday across all 16 German states, one of 9 nationwide holidays) confirmed via WebSearch against Wikipedia/timeanddate.com/publicholidays.de.

Competitor check: arab-deutschland.com is a cultural/tourism guide, wikigerman.net/studyshoot.com/elkhatib.net are general state-by-state holiday lists without distinguishing uniform vs. regional holidays, amalfrankfurt.de is Frankfurt-specific shopping-hours content, none has a dedicated countdown/FAQ page.
